column1: # mapping_set_description: DPV `loc` extension <-> ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes. LLM-seeded candidate alignments (Claude Opus 4.7, single-step prompt against DPV 2.3 loc terms and the ISO 3166-1 country list); each row classifies as `semapv:LLMBasedMatching` and requires human review before promotion to `semapv:LLMBasedMatching`. Only the top-level country individuals are seeded here; the 10,000+ ISO 3166-2 subdivision rows in the `loc` extension already encode the subdivision code in their local name (e.g. `loc:USCA` <-> ISO 3166-2 US-CA) and can be mapped algorithmically rather than enumerated.

column5: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
